word: G4809 - συκομωραία - sykomōraía - soo-kom-o-rah'-yah - Sycamore tree

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συκομωραία

- Transliteration: Sukomoraia

- Phonetic: soo-kom-o-rah'-yah

- Definition:

1. a sycomore tree

- Origin: from G4810 and moron (the mulberry)

- TDNT entry: 7:758,*

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G4810 and μόρον moron (the mulberry); the sycamore or fig tree: - sycamore tree. Compare G4807.
